title: galactia volubilis var. fasciculata
intro: Galactia volubilis var. fasciculata, also known as the clustered milk pea, is a perennial vine native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Galactia volubilis var. fasciculata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to act as an antiviral and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used topically to aid in the healing process and internally to support overall health and well-being.
